requirements.summary: Revert all Version 28 changes to UPI payment components, restoring the Version 27 implementation
acceptanceCriteria: All frontend files reflect the state of Version 27
Changes introduced in Version 28 (UPI deep link updates in UpiPaymentButtons.tsx and UpiPaymentOptionsModal.tsx) are no longer present
The application builds and runs successfully at the Version 27 state

file_operations.description: Revert UpiPaymentButtons component to Version 27 implementation, removing any Version 28 deep link fixes or enhancements. Restore the original UPI payment button behavior and link generation logic that existed in Version 27.

Revert UpiPaymentOptionsModal component to Version 27 implementation, removing any Version 28 deep link updates. Restore the original modal behavior, UPI option handling, and payment flow that existed in Version 27.
